name: :memo: An awesome Data Science repository to learn and apply for real world problems.
description: :memo: An awesome Data Science repository to learn and apply for real world problems.

links.title: How to Become a Data Scientist
Software Development Resources for Data Scientists
Navigating Your Path to Becoming a Data Scientist
ADK-Rust
links.description: Production-ready AI agent development kit for Rust with model-agnostic design (Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic), multiple agent types (LLM, Graph, Workflow), MCP support, and built-in telemetry.

links.title: Frostbyte MCP
links.description: MCP server providing 13 data tools for AI agents: real-time crypto prices, IP geolocation, DNS lookups, web scraping to markdown, code execution, and screenshots. One API key for 40+ services.

links.title: Arch Tools
links.description: 61 production-ready AI API tools for data science workflows: code analysis, web scraping, NLP, image generation, crypto data, and search. REST API and MCP protocol support. [GitHub](https://github.com/Deesmo/Arch-AI-Tools)

links.title: Not Human Search
links.description: Search engine for AI agents that indexes 9,000+ AI tools and APIs, scoring each on agentic readiness (llms.txt, OpenAPI, MCP, ai-plugin.json). REST API and MCP server for programmatic tool discovery. [GitHub](https://github.com/unitedideas/nothumansearch)

links.title: DeepAlpha
links.description: AI crypto trading framework using LightGBM + XGBoost ensemble with 72 ML features. 70.9% walk-forward validated accuracy on out-of-sample data. Supports Bybit and Binance. MIT licensed, available on [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/deepalpha-bot/).

links.title: CAJAL
links.description: Local AI agent for generating publication-ready scientific papers with real arXiv citations, IMRaD structure, and tribunal scoring. Runs 100% offline via Ollama with 4B-9B models. MIT licensed. [HuggingFace](https://huggingface.co/Agnuxo/CAJAL-9B-P2PCLAW)

links.title: ai-evaluation
links.description: Open-source LLM and agent evaluation framework with 50+ metrics, LLM-as-Judge augmentation, and guardrail scanners (jailbreak, PII, prompt-injection). Useful for scoring RAG outputs, agent trajectories, and function-calling behavior in data-science workflows.

links.title: BGPT MCP
links.description: MCP server that gives AI agents access to a database of scientific papers built from raw experimental data extracted from full-text studies. Returns 25+ structured fields per paper including methods, results, sample sizes, and quality scores. [GitHub](https://github.com/connerlambden/bgpt-mcp)

links.title: Chunk Tuner
links.description: Open-source Python library and MCP server to benchmark document chunking strategies for RAG, score retrieval quality, and recommend configurations for a corpus.

links.title: II-Commons
links.description: Daily-updated skill and CLI for deterministic retrieval across arXiv, PubMed/PMC, and supported US policy corpora.

links.title: Spraay x402 Gateway
links.description: x402 payment gateway with 23 Research & Reference endpoints for AI agents: Wikipedia, arXiv, PubMed, Wikidata, academic citation lookup, entity extraction, and more. Pay-per-call in USDC on Base & Solana — no API keys or subscriptions. Also serves 150+ endpoints across 39 categories including geospatial, AI inference, DeFi, and compute. [GitHub](https://github.com/plagtech)

links.title: Suppr
links.description: AI literature search, document translation, and deep-research workspace for researchers.

links.title: sim
links.description: Sim Studio's interface is a lightweight, intuitive way to quickly build and deploy LLMs that connect with your favorite tools.

links.title: #tidytuesday
links.description: A weekly data project aimed at the R ecosystem.

links.title: Chinese Tea Dataset
links.description: Curated open dataset of 100+ Chinese teas with category, origin, caffeine level, flavor notes, oxidation, and brewing parameters. Available as JSON and CSV.

links.title: College ROI Dataset
links.description: Lifetime return-on-investment estimates for 29,700 US bachelor's programs across 3,392 colleges, built from FREOPP, IPEDS, and BEA regional price data. 5 CSVs with data dictionary, CC BY 4.0, Zenodo DOI.

links.title: AI Displacement Tracker
links.description: Structured dataset tracking 92 AI-attributed workforce reduction events affecting 453,748 workers across 12 countries and 11 sectors. JSON and CSV formats. CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

links.title: Packrift Packaging Optimization Benchmark Corpus
links.description: Public packaging product dataset generated from 1,000 exact-spec SKU records, with downloadable CSV and JSON files for ecommerce fulfillment and warehouse analysis.

links.title: data.gov
links.description: The home of the U.S. Government's open data

links.title: enigma.com
links.description: Navigate the world of public data - Quickly search and analyze billions of public records published by governments, companies and organizations.

links.title: The official portal for European data
NASDAQ:DATA
links.description: Nasdaq Data Link A premier source for financial, economic and alternative datasets.

links.title: Congressional Stock Brain
links.description: Free AI-powered tool that scores U.S. congressional STOCK Act trade disclosures by significance. Machine-scored signals from 537 lawmakers's public trade filings.

links.title: Japan Neighborhoods
links.description: English dataset of Tokyo crime statistics across 5,078 neighborhoods × 7 years (36,222 records, 2018-2024), sourced from Tokyo Metropolitan Police open data. Includes interactive crime map, safety grading, and cost-of-living index. CC BY licensed.

links.title: Crime Brasil
links.description: Open-data platform for Brazilian crime statistics. Neighborhood-level in Rio Grande do Sul (2.99M incidents across 79,024 neighborhoods, 2022–2025), municipality-level for MG and RJ, plus national PRF highway and DATASUS interpersonal-violence data. Free REST API, CSV/Parquet, daily updates, CC BY 4.0.

links.title: US Truck-Involved Fatal Crashes (FARS) 2018-2024
links.description: Filtered subset of NHTSA Fatality Analysis Reporting System covering 33,898 fatal crashes involving medium and heavy commercial trucks across all 50 US states, 2018-2024. Includes interactive [Vision Zero Report Card](https://accidentlawyerreview.com/research/vision-zero-report-card/) comparing 19 cities, reproducible Python pipeline on [GitHub](https://github.com/MarvinBregiosa/vision-zero-fars), and HuggingFace mirror. Permanent DOI, CC BY 4.0.

links.title: State of Peptides 2026
links.description: Structured reference dataset of 156 peptide and peptide-adjacent compounds, each with a regulatory status bucket, category, route, half-life, molecular weight, CAS number, reference count, and PubChem/DrugBank/Wikidata IDs. CSV and JSON, no login, CC BY 4.0.

links.title: A Deep Catalog of Human Genetic Variation
A community-curated database of well-known people, places, and things
MapLight
links.description: provides a variety of data free of charge for uses that are freely available to the general public. Click on a data set below to learn more

links.title: GHDx
links.description: Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation - a catalog of health and demographic datasets from around the world and including IHME results

links.title: St. Louis Federal Reserve Economic Data - FRED
New Zealand Institute of Economic Research – Data1850
NASA SocioEconomic Data and Applications Center - SEDAC
StackExchange Data Explorer
links.description: an open source tool for running arbitrary queries against public data from the Stack Exchange network.

links.title: 250k+ Job Postings
links.description: An expanding dataset of historical job postings from Luxembourg from 2020 to today. Free with 250k+ job postings hosted on AWS Data Exchange.

links.title: FinancialData.Net
links.description: Financial datasets (stock market data, financial statements, sustainability data, and more).

links.title: BDE Score
links.description: AI-powered multi-market stock analysis with transparent BDE scoring across 73 stocks (US/HK/A-share). EU AI Act Art.50 compliant. MIT license.

links.title: notesjor corpus-collection
links.description: Free corpora (over 6 billion tokens) mostly German (both historically and in contemporary German).

links.title: CLARIN-Repository
links.description: CLARIN is a European repository for scientific datasets.

links.title: GBIF
links.description: Global Biodiversity Information Facility: 2.4B+ species occurrence records. Free, open API for ecological modeling and ML research.

links.title: FAOSTAT
links.description: UN FAO statistics on food production, trade, land use, and emissions for 245+ countries. Free API and bulk download.

links.title: Movebank
links.description: Free platform archiving 6B+ animal movement records from GPS and satellite telemetry. Open REST API, useful for spatiotemporal modeling and trajectory ML.

links.title: Encyclopedia of Life
links.description: Open structured data on 1.9M+ species, including traits, classification, and media. Free API and bulk downloads for biodiversity and species-classification tasks.

links.title: latamdata-py
links.description: Python package for one-line access to 38 open research datasets from Latin America (health, neuroscience, mental health, economics). pip install latamdata-py.

links.title: ZipCheckup
links.description: Free ZIP-level environmental safety data for 42,000+ US ZIP codes: water quality, air quality, PFAS contamination, radon, lead, flood risk, and 11 more verticals. Public REST API, npm/PyPI packages, CC BY 4.0.

links.title: Helium
links.description: Real-time news corpus with structured bias features across 15+ dimensions (3.2M+ articles, 5,000+ sources), live financial market data (stocks, ETFs, crypto) with AI-generated analysis, ML options pricing with probability metrics and full Greeks, historical options chain data for quantitative research; available via MCP server or REST API.

links.title: Verified Supplement Evidence
links.description: Evidence-graded dietary-supplement dataset covering dosing, bioavailability by form, drug-nutrient interactions, NHANES deficiency prevalence, FDA FAERS adverse-event signals, and cost-per-effective-dose, with every clinical claim citing a PubMed PMID. CC BY 4.0, DOI 10.57967/hf/9356.
